objective: Stratégie de Multi-factor sur 0GUSDC 15m. Indicateurs : RSI + SUPERTREND + ATR. Signal composite : RSI + SUPERTREND + ATR doivent tous confirmer la direction. Sortie progressive : réduction quand RSI diverge, clôture si SUPERTREND se retourne. Stop-loss dynamique basé sur ATR (1.8x), ratio risk/reward 2.8:1.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining RSI with Bollinger Bands and ATR will provide a more reliable signal to enter trades on the 0GUSDC futures contract.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining RSI, Bollinger bands and ATR with SuperTrend and ADX will create a robust strategy to enter long positions when both RSI and Supertrend have confirmed the trend in same direction and close price crosses below the lower band of Bollinger while SuperTrend is bullish and ATR divergence confirms that price is not over-extended. Similarly, for short positions, we wait for confirmation from RSI, Supertrend and ATR crossing above upper band of Bollinger and superTrend being bearish.
